name: Data Type Mapping
description: Exhaustive validation of every data type in the warehouse — test casting, precision, and edge cases for each type

name: Data Profiling
description: Comprehensive data quality profiling — NULL rates, cardinality, distributions, and completeness across all tables

name: SQL Query Patterns
description: Validate complex SQL capabilities — JOINs, CTEs, window functions, subqueries, UNION, GROUP BY with HAVING, and nested aggregations

name: Edge Cases
description: Test boundary conditions — NULL arithmetic, empty strings, large numbers, timestamp precision, COALESCE, and CASE expressions
